svg.title: XML Infosets
svg.desc: The slide shows the various XML Infoset entries, with the corresponding properties.

rdf:Description.desc: The #DocumentProperties block appears only when the mouse is over #DocumentII
The #ElementProperties block appears only when the mouse is over #ElementII
The #AttributeProperties block appears only when the mouse is over #AttributeII
The #ProcessingInstructionProperties block appears only when the mouse is over #ProcessingInstructionII
The #ElementProperties block appears only when the mouse is over #UnexpandedEntityII
The #CharacterProperties block appears only when the mouse is over #CharacterII
The #CommentProperties block appears only when the mouse is over #CommentII
The #DocumentTypeProperties block appears only when the mouse is over #DocumentTypeII
The #UnparsedEntityProperties block appears only when the mouse is over #UnparsedEntityII
The #NotationProperties block appears only when the mouse is over #NotationII
The #NamespaceProperties block appears only when the mouse is over #NamespaceII

g.desc: Document Information Item and its properies

List of Document properties in a table. The "document" and "children" labels are linked to the #Element resource, the "notation" label to #Notation resource, and the "Unparsed Entities" to the #UnparsedEntity resource.
Element Information Item and its properies

List of Element properties in a table. The "parent" labels is linked to the #Element resource, the "children" label to #Element, #ProcessingInstruction, #UnparsedEntity, #Character and #Comment resources, and the "Attributes" to the #Attribute resource, the 'In-scope Namespaces' label to the #Namespace resource, and the 'Namespace Attributes' to the #Attribute resource.
Attribute Information Item and its properies
List of Attribute properties in a table. The "References" label is linked to the #Element, #UnparsedEntity, and #Notation resources, the "Owner Element" label to #Element resource.
Processing Instruction Information Item and its properies
List of Processing Instruction properties in a table. The "Notation" is linked to the #Notation resource, the "parent" label to #Element, #Document and #DocumentType resources.
Unexpanded Entity Information Item and its properies
List of Unexpanded Entity properties in a table. The "parent" label is linked to the #Element resource.
Character Information Item and its properies
List of Character properties in a table. The "parent" label is linked to the #Element resource.
Comment Information Item and its properies
List of Comment properties in a table. The "parent" label is linked to the #Element resource.
Document Type Information Item and its properies
List of Document Type properties in a table. The "children" labels is linked to the #ProcessingInstruction resource, the "parent" label to #Document resource.
Unparsed Entity Information Item and its properies
List of Unparsed Entityproperties in a table. The "Notation" and "children" labels are linked to the #Notation.
Notation Information Item and its properies
List of Notationproperties in a table.
Namespace Information Item and its properies
List of Namespace properties in a table.
